# pheno-tracing

> Canonical tracing init across all pheno-* repos (ADR-012). One-liner `init()` installs the tracing-subscriber (env-filter + JSON formatter); every fleet crate depends on this for consistent log output and OTLP export.

## Quickstart

```toml
# Cargo.toml
[dependencies]
pheno-tracing = "0.1"
```

```rust
use pheno_tracing::init;
init("my-service")?;  // installs the env-filter subscriber
tracing::info!("hello fleet");
```

## Public API

```rust
pheno_tracing::init(service_name: &str) -> Result<(), TracingError>
pheno_tracing::init_with_format(service_name, Format) -> Result<(), TracingError>
pheno_tracing::Format (Plain, Json)
pheno_tracing::TracingError (SubscriberInit, EnvParse)
```

## Files

- `Cargo.toml`
- `src/lib.rs`
- `src/port.rs`
- `src/adapters.rs`
- `tests/`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `llms.txt`
- `WORKLOG.md`
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `LICENSE-MIT`
- `LICENSE-APACHE`
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml`

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`).
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`); `#![warn(missing_docs)]` on the
  public API.
- 80% lib coverage gate (ADR-023 Rule 3.1); see `coverage` job in
  `.github/workflows/ci.yml`.
- Standalone crate (empty `[workspace]` table in `Cargo.toml`); not
  a member of the root monorepo workspace.
- WORKLOG.md is the change history (v2.1 schema, 7 cols + `device`).

## See also

- `AGENTS.md` — agent context.
- `WORKLOG.md` — change history (v2.1 schema).
- `CHANGELOG.md` — release notes.
- `LICENSE-MIT` / `LICENSE-APACHE` — dual license.
- Sibling: pheno-otel, pheno-context, pheno-port-adapter, pheno-errors.
